treephysics.config.title: Tree Physics Config
treephysics.config.despawn_time.tooltip: The amount of time in ticks a tree will exist before despawning
treephysics.config.despawn_behavior.tool:
NO_DESPAWN: Trees will not despawn at all
DESPAWN_SMALL: Trees with 5 or less logs will despawn
DESPAWN_ALL: Every tree will despawn
treephysics.config.requires_axe.tooltip: If an axe should be required to make tree sub-levels
treephysics.config.can_walk_through_leav: If entities should be able to walk through leaves
treephysics.config.leaf_walking_speed.to: Multiplier for entity walking speed when in leaves
treephysics.config.tree_entity_damage.to: How much damage a falling tree should inflict on an entity when moving at 1 block per tick
treephysics.config.physics.gravity_multi: How much extra gravity should be applied to trees
How long in ticks the gravity multiplier should be applied. -1 for infinite
treephysics.config.physics.impulse_force: How much force should be applied to trees when chopped down
treephysics.config.physics.impulse_torqu: How much torque should be applied to trees when chopped down
treephysics.config.physics.extra_push_mu: How much extra pushing strength should be applied for upright trees
treephysics.config.physics.static_leaf_c: If leaves not on sub-levels should have collision
